title: dvrk_display mono configuration
description: Configuration file for the dvrk_display node in mono mode. Describes a single video source and ROS publishing targets.

type.description: Schema type identifier. Must be exactly "dd::mono_config@1.0.0".

dvrk_console_namespace.description: ROS namespace of the dVRK console.

ros_image_publishers.description: List of ROS image streams to publish. For mono, usually just "mono".

original_width.description: Desired width of the display window. If not provided, defaults to 640.

original_height.description: Desired height of the display window. If not provided, defaults to 480.

stream.description: GStreamer pipeline fragment for the mono camera source.

sinks.description: List of sink definitions. Each specifies what to display and how to display it.

items.description: Display method. 'glimage' for a standard OpenGL window, 'unixfd' for zero-copy shared memory, 'custom' for a user-specified string.

unixfdsinks.description: List of unixfdsink configurations. Used to expose internal pipeline streams via shared memory.

stream.description: The internal video stream to attach to. 'raw' for video without HUD, 'overlay' for video with HUD.

name.description: Optional custom name for the GStreamer element.

socket_path.description: Optional custom socket path for this specific sink.

unixfd_socket_path.description: Global fallback filesystem path of the Unix file-descriptor socket used for zero-copy shared-memory transport.
